headline: Travelers Injury Impact Report Highlights Longer Recovery Times Amid Declining Injury Rates
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., May 04, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today released its 2026 Injury Impact Report, an analysis of more than 1.2 million workers compensation claims received by the company from 2021 through 2025. The report finds that even as workplace injury rates decline, the injuries that do occur are growing more complex and taking longer to heal – a trend driven by an aging workforce and the disproportionate vulnerability of first-year employees.
